title: Loopress snippet metadata
description: Sidecar .json file paired with a snippet's code file in the snippets directory (e.g. `123-my-snippet.php` + `123-my-snippet.json`).

id.description: Remote snippet id. Omitted until the snippet has been pushed for the first time.

name.description: Snippet name/title. Defaults to the code file's name when omitted.

type.description: Snippet language. Defaults to the type inferred from the code file's extension when omitted.

location.description: Where the snippet runs. Supported values depend on the target plugin and snippet type.

insertMethod.description: How the snippet is inserted into the page.

shortcodeAttributes.description: Attribute names accepted by the snippet's shortcode, used when insertMethod is "shortcode".
